creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ilya:

Thank you for your work, and testing of this on redports.  This is 
always helpful.

I think I will wait for the ports freeze (slush) to be over as we wait 
for FreeBSD 9.1 to be released.

All of these thrift ports interact, and this patch can cause 
(undefined?) side affects without the other thrift ports committed at once.

I also think I will put in a _DEPENDS >= to make sure that someone 
doesn't accidentally update this without updating thrift.

(Valery: Am I correct this one shouldn't be committed all by itself, right?)

-- 
Michael Scheidell
Will Hack For Food
http://people.freebsd.org/~scheidell
